title: Tatooine sand cape
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Tatooine sand cape''' was a [[Cape/Legends|cape]] worn on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to protect against sandstorms. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] fashioned a patchwork robe from a Tatooine sand cape and a [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''

[[Category:Robes and cloaks]]
